verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Yield not to temptation, for yielding is sin Each victory will help you or some others to win Fight manfully onward, dark passions subdue Look ever to Jesus and He'll carry you through

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Just ask the Savior to help you To comfort, strengthen and keep you He is willing to aid you And He will carry you through

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Ask the Savior to help you To comfort, strengthen and heal you Oh, He is willing to aid you Jesus will carry you through

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Shun evil companions, bad language disdain God's name hold in reverence, don't take it in vain Be thoughtful and honest, kindhearted and true Look ever to Jesus, He'll carry you through

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, ask the Savior to help you To comfort, strengthen and keep you Oh, He is willing to aid you Jesus, He will carry you through

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: All I wanna do is ask the Savior to help you Comfort, strengthen and keep you He is willing to aid you And He will carry you through

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I wanna just ask the Savior to help you To comfort, strengthen and keep you He is willing to aid you He will carry you through
